title: SMA Sunny Portal unrestricted upload of dangerous file type
description: CISA advisory for SMA Sunny Portal. Search snippets state all versions before December 19, 2024 were affected.

title: OutBack Power Mojave Inverter use of GET request method with sensitive query strings
description: CISA and CVE.org describe sensitive information exposure via GET requests in OutBack Power Mojave Inverter.

title: OutBack Power Mojave Inverter exposure of sensitive information to an unauthorized actor
description: CISA advisory states URL modification could expose sensitive information about the target network.

title: OutBack Power Mojave Inverter command injection
description: CVE.org describes command injection via specially crafted POST requests affecting OutBack Power Mojave Inverter.

title: EG4 Inverters vulnerability fixed by vendor on April 6, 2025
description: CISA update snippet notes EG4 deployed a fix on April 6, 2025 and no action is required for this specific issue.

title: EG4 Inverters vulnerability in 2025 advisory family
description: ENISA EUVD advisory for ICSA-25-219-07 lists CVE-2025-47872 among affected EG4 inverter vulnerabilities.

title: EG4 Inverters cleartext transmission of sensitive information
description: Third-party summaries citing CISA describe cleartext transmission of sensitive information affecting EG4 inverters.

title: EG4 Inverters firmware update integrity issue
description: CISA update snippet states new firmware now only allows approved firmware files to be installed.
